CFG.API_KEY_DESC: Insert the Trello API key here.
CFG.TOKEN_DESC: Insert the Trello API token here.
CFG.BOARD_DESC: Select the board to search and import cards from. Enter your API key and token first, then the list loads.
CFG.FILTER_USERNAME_DESC: If provided, only imports cards assigned to this Trello username.

FORM_HELP: Configure Super Productivity to list and import cards from a Trello board in the task creation panel. Generate an API key and token at trello.com/power-ups/admin, then load and select your board. See the Trello REST API docs for details.
